animation.title: Animation
animation.description: An animation is a set of keyframes that can be applied to an element.

control.title: Element
control.description: An element is a control that can be added to a screen. It can be a button, a label, an image, etc.

anyOf.title: Property Name
anyOf.description: A known UI element property name.

controls.title: Controls
controls.description: The controls that are contained within this element.

control_name.title: Control Name
control_name.description: The control to apply the operation to.

array_name.title: Array Name
array_name.description: The array to apply the operation to.

color1.description: The color to start the gradient with.

color2.description: The color to end the gradient with.

anyOf.title: Property Name
anyOf.description: A known UI element property name.

variable-key.title: Variable Name
variable-key.description: A variable definition key using the $ prefix, optionally with a default value after |.

A.title: Variable Definition
A.description: A variable value assignment used in the UI. Can be a boolean, number, string, array, or object.

D.title: Variable
D.description: A variable is a reference to a value that can be used in the UI.

anyOf.title: Element Reference
anyOf.description: A reference to an element using the following syntax: [element_name]@[namespace_reference].[element_name_reference]

anyOf.title: Element Reference
anyOf.description: A reference to an element using the following syntax: [namespace_reference].[element_name_reference]

anyOf.title: Variable Reference
anyOf.description: A variable is a reference to a value that can be used in the UI.

E.title: Animation Reset Name
E.description: The name of the animation that will be reset.

G.title: Destroy At End
G.description: If set, the given element will be destroyed at the end of the animation.

H.title: Disable Anim Fast Forward
H.description: If true, the animation will not be fast forwarded.

BC.title: End Event
BC.description: The event that will be triggered when the animation ends.

BE.title: Frame Count
BE.description: The number of frames in the animation.

oneOf.description: A size with width and height.

BH.title: From
BH.description: The starting point of the animation.

BJ.title: Initial UV
BJ.description: The initial UV of the animation.

CA.title: Next
CA.description: The name of the next element.

CB.title: Play Event
CB.description: The event that will be played.

CC.title: Propagate Alpha
CC.description: If true, this element will apply the same alpha value to its controlled element(s).

CD.title: Reversible
CD.description: If true, the animation will be reversible.

CE.title: Scale From Starting Alpha
CE.description: If true, the animation will scale from the starting alpha.

CF.title: To
CF.description: The ending point of the animation.

CI.title: Reset Event
CI.description: The event that will reset the animation.

CJ.title: Resettable
CJ.description: If true, the animation can be reset.

DA.title: Activated
DA.description: A binding name that controls whether the animation is active.

DB.title: Start Event
DB.description: The event that will start the animation.

DD_binding.title: Binding
DD_binding.description: A binding that is contained within this element.

binding_collection_name.title: Binding Collection Name
binding_collection_name.description: The name of the collection that the binding is in.

binding_collection_prefix.title: Binding Collection Prefix
binding_collection_prefix.description: The prefix of the collection that the binding is in.

binding_condition.title: Binding Condition
binding_condition.description: The condition that must be met for the binding to be applied.

binding_name.title: Binding Name
binding_name.description: The name of the binding. This is used to reference the binding in the element's properties.

binding_name_override.title: Binding Name Override
binding_name_override.description: The name of the binding. This is used to reference the binding in the element's properties.

binding_type.title: Binding Type
binding_type.description: The type of the binding. The default is global.

ignored.title: Ignored
ignored.description: If true, the binding will be ignored.

resolve_sibling_scope.title: Resolve Sibling Scope
resolve_sibling_scope.description: If true, the binding will resolve sibling scope.

source_control_name.title: Source Control Name
source_control_name.description: The name of the control that the binding is in.

source_property_name.title: Source Property Name
source_property_name.description: The name of the property that the binding is in.

target_property_name.title: Target Property Name
target_property_name.description: The name of the property that the binding is in.

DD.title: Bindings
DD.description: The bindings that are contained within this element.

anyOf.title: Binding
anyOf.description: The binding that is contained within this element.

DE.title: Allow Clipping
DE.description: If true, the element will allow clipping.

DF.title: Allow Debug Missing Texture
DF.description: If true, the element will show the black and purple placeholder texture if the referenced image is not found.

DG.title: Allow Scroll Even When Content Fits
DG.description: If true, the element will allow scrolling even when the content fits.

DI.title: Always Handle Pointer
DI.description: If true, the element will always handle the pointer.

DJ.title: Always Handle Scrolling
DJ.description: If true, the element will always handle scrolling.

EA.title: Always Listen To Input
EA.description: If true, the element will always listen to input.

EB.title: Always Listening
EB.description: If true, the element will always listen for input events even when not focused.

EC.title: Always Rotate
EC.description: If true, the element will always rotate.

EE.title: Anchor
EE.description: An anchor is a reference to an element in the UI.

ED.title: Anchor From
ED.description: The anchor point of the element. This is the point that the element will be positioned relative to.

EF.title: Anchor To
EF.description: The anchor point of the element. This is the point that the element will be positioned relative to.

EG.title: Animations
EG.description: The animations that are contained within this element.

EH.title: Background Control
EH.description: The control that will be used for the background.

EI.title: Background Hover Control
EI.description: The control that will be used for the background when hovered.

EJ.title: Backup Font Type
EJ.description: The type of the backup font.

FA.title: Bilinear
FA.description: If true, the element will use bilinear filtering.

FB_button_mapping.title: Button Mapping
FB_button_mapping.description: A button mapping entry that maps an input button action to a UI button event.

from_button_id.title: From Button ID
from_button_id.description: The button ID to map from.

to_button_id.title: To Button ID
to_button_id.description: The button ID to map to.

ignored.title: Ignored
ignored.description: If true, this button mapping is ignored.

scope.title: Scope
scope.description: The scope for the button mapping (e.g., 'view').

input_mode_condition.title: Input Mode Condition
input_mode_condition.description: The input mode condition for this mapping (e.g., 'gamepad', 'touch').

handle_select.title: Handle Select
handle_select.description: If true, this mapping handles the select event.

handle_deselect.title: Handle Deselect
handle_deselect.description: If true, this mapping handles the deselect event.

consume_event.title: Consume Event
consume_event.description: If true, the input event is consumed and not propagated further.

FB.title: Button Mappings
FB.description: The button mappings that are contained within this element.

FC.title: Cache Screen
FC.description: If true, the screen will be cached.

FD.title: Camera Tilt Degrees
FD.description: The degrees the camera is tilted for a paper doll renderer.

FE.title: Checked Control
FE.description: The control that will be checked.

FF.title: Checked Hover Control
FF.description: The control that will be checked when hovered.

FG.title: Checked Locked Control
FG.description: The control that will be checked when locked.

FH.title: Checked Locked Hover Control
FH.description: The control that will be checked when locked and hovered.

FI.title: Clip Direction
FI.description: The direction that the element will be clipped in.

FJ.title: Clip Pixel Perfect
FJ.description: If true, the element will be clipped pixel perfect.

GA.title: Clip Ratio
GA.description: A value between 0.0 and 1.0 that controls how much of the element is clipped, used together with clip_direction.

GB.title: Clips Children
GB.description: If true, the element will clip its children.

GC.title: Close On Player Hurt
GC.description: If true, the element will close when the player is hurt.

GD.title: Collection Index
GD.description: The index of the collection that the element is in.

GE.title: Collection Name
GE.description: The name of the collection that the element is in.

GH.title: Animation Reference
GH.description: A reference to an animation element using the following syntax: [animation_name]@[namespace_reference].[animation_name_reference]

GF.title: Color
GF.description: The color of the text. This can be a hex color code or a color keyword.

GJ.title: Consume Hover Events
GJ.description: If true, the element will consume hover events.

HA.title: Contained
HA.description: If true, the element will be contained.

HC.title: Debug
HC.description: A debug color overlay for the element. Used for layout debugging purposes.

HD.title: Default Control
HD.description: The default control that will be focused.

HE.title: Default Focus Precedence
HE.description: The default focus precedence of the element.

HF.title: Draggable
HF.description: If true, the element will be draggable.

oneOf.description: A size with width and height.

HG.title: Dropdown Area
HG.description: The area that the dropdown will be in.

HI.title: Dropdown Content Control
HI.description: The control that will be used for the dropdown content.

IA.title: Enable Directional Toggling
IA.description: If true, the element will enable directional toggling.

IB.title: Enable Profanity Filter
IB.description: If true, the element will enable the profanity filter.

IC.title: Enabled Newline
IC.description: If true, the element will be enabled when a new line is created.

ID.title: Enabled
ID.description: If true, the element will be enabled.

IF.title: Control IDs
IF.description: The IDs of the controls that will be created by the factory.

IE.title: Factory
IE.description: The factory that will be used to create the element.

control_name.title: Control Name
control_name.description: The name of the control that will be created by the factory.

factory_variables.title: Factory Variables
factory_variables.description: The variables that will be used by the factory.

IG.title: Fill
IG.description: If true, the element will fill the screen.

JB.title: Focus Container
JB.description: If true, the element will be a focus container.

JC.title: Focus Enabled
JC.description: If true, the element will be focus enabled.

JD.title: Focus Identifier
JD.description: The identifier of the element that will be focused.

JE.title: Focus Magnet Enabled
JE.description: If true, the element will be focus magnet enabled.

JF.title: Focus Mapping
JF.description: If true, the element will be focus magnet enabled.
JF.$comment: The only place this is used in vanilla is in beacon_screen.json and it doesn't give much information

JH.title: Navigation Mode
JH.description: The navigation mode of the UI.

JG.title: Focus Navigation Mode Down
JG.description: The focus navigation mode that will be used when navigating down.

JI.title: Focus Navigation Mode Left
JI.description: The focus navigation mode that will be used when navigating left.

JJ.title: Focus Navigation Mode Right
JJ.description: The focus navigation mode that will be used when navigating right.

BAA.title: Focus Navigation Mode Up
BAA.description: The focus navigation mode that will be used when navigating up.

BAB.title: Focus Wrap Enabled
BAB.description: If true, the element will be focus wrap enabled.

BAC.title: Font Scale Factor
BAC.description: The scale factor of the font.

BAF.title: Force Render Below
BAF.description: If true, the element will be rendered below the screen.

BAG.title: Force Texture Reload
BAG.description: If true, the texture will be reloaded.

BAH.title: Grid Dimension Binding
BAH.description: The binding that will be used for the grid dimension.

BAJ.title: Grid Item Template
BAJ.description: The template that will be used for the grid item.

BBB.title: Grid Rescaling Type
BBB.description: The type of the grid rescaling.

BBC.title: Handle Deselect
BBC.description: If true, the element will handle deselect.

BBD.title: Handle Select
BBD.description: If true, the element will handle select.

BBE.title: Hide Hyphen
BBE.description: If true, the element will hide the hyphen.

BBF.title: Hover Control
BBF.description: The control that will be hovered.

BBG.title: Hover Enabled
BBG.description: If true, the element will be hover enabled.

BBH.title: Ignored
BBH.description: If true, the element will be ignored. Can be a boolean or a string expression.

BBI.title: Images
BBI.description: The images that are contained within this element.

BCA.title: Indent Control
BCA.description: The control that will be indented.

BCB.title: Inherit Max Sibling Height
BCB.description: If true, the element will inherit the maximum height of its siblings.

BCC.title: Inherit Max Sibling Width
BCC.description: If true, the element will inherit the maximum width of its siblings.

BCD.title: Is Modal
BCD.description: If true, the element will be modal.

BCE.title: Is New Nine Slice
BCE.description: If true, the element will use the newer 9-slice rendering system.

BCF.title: Is Showing Menu
BCF.description: If true, the element will be showing the menu.

BCG.title: Jump To Bottom On Update
BCG.description: If true, the element will jump to the bottom when updated.

BCH.title: Keep Ratio
BCH.description: If true, the element will keep its ratio.

BCI.title: Layer
BCI.description: The layer that the element will be rendered in. Higher layers are rendered on top of lower layers.

BDA.title: Localize
BDA.description: If true, the element will be localized.

BDB.title: Locked Control
BDB.description: The control that will be locked.

BDC.title: Low Frequency Rendering
BDC.description: If true, the element will be rendered at a lower frequency.

BDD.title: Max Length
BDD.description: The maximum length of the text. If the text is longer than this, it will be truncated.

BDE.title: Max Size
BDE.description: The maximum size of the element.

BDG.title: Maximum Grid Items
BDG.description: The maximum number of grid items.

BDH.title: Min Size
BDH.description: The minimum size of the element.

BDI.title: Modal
BDI.description: If true, the element will be modal.

BDJ.title: Offset
BDJ.description: The offset of the element from the anchor point. horizontal by vertical.

BEA.title: Place Holder Control
BEA.description: The control that will be used for the place holder.

BEB.title: Pressed Control
BEB.description: The control that will be pressed.

BEC.title: Prevent Touch Input
BEC.description: If true, touch input will be prevented from passing through this element.

BEE.title: Progress Control
BEE.description: The control that will be used for the progress.

BEF.title: Progress Hover Control
BEF.description: The control that will be used for the progress when hovered.

BEG.title: Property Bag
BEG.description: The property bag that will be used by the element.

BEI.title: Radio Toggle Group
BEI.description: The radio toggle group that the element is in.

BEJ.title: Render Game Behind
BEJ.description: If true, the game will be rendered behind the element.

BFA.title: Render Only When Topmost
BFA.description: If true, the element will only be rendered when it is the topmost element.

BFB.title: Renderer
BFB.description: The renderer that will be used by the element.

BFC.title: Replaced While Inactive
BFC.description: If true, the control will be replaced while inactive.

BFD.title: Reset On Focus Lost
BFD.description: If true, the element will be reset when focus is lost.

BFE.title: Rotate Speed
BFE.description: The speed that the element will rotate at.

BFF.title: Screen Draws Last
BFF.description: If true, the screen will be drawn last.

BFG.title: Screen Not Flushable
BFG.description: If true, the screen will not be flushed when the element is added.

BFH.title: Scroll Box And Track Panel
BFH.description: The panel that will be used for the scroll box and track.

BFI.title: Scroll Content
BFI.description: The content that will be scrolled.

BFJ.title: Scroll Speed
BFJ.description: The speed that the element will scroll at.

BGA.title: Scroll View Port
BGA.description: The view port that the element will be scrolled in.

BGC.title: Scrollbar Touch Button
BGC.description: The button that will be used for the scrollbar touch.

BGD.title: Scrollbar Track Button
BGD.description: The button that will be used for the scrollbar track.

BGF.title: Send Telemetry
BGF.description: If true, the element will send telemetry.

BGG.title: Shadow
BGG.description: If true, the text will have a shadow.

BGH.title: Should Steal Mouse
BGH.description: If true, the element will steal the mouse.

BGJ.title: Slider Box Control
BGJ.description: The control that will be used for the slider box.

BHA.title: Slider Collection Name
BHA.description: The name of the collection that the slider is in.

BHB.title: Slider Deselected Button
BHB.description: The button that will be used for the slider deselected.

BHE.title: Slider Select On Hover
BHE.description: If true, the slider will select on hover.

BHF.title: Slider Selected Button
BHF.description: The button that will be used for the slider selected.

BHG.title: Slider Small Decrease Button
BHG.description: The button that will be used for the slider small decrease.

BHH.title: Slider Small Increase Button
BHH.description: The button that will be used for the slider small decrease.

BHJ.title: Slider Track Button
BHJ.description: The button that will be used for the slider track.

BIE.title: Text Box Name
BIE.description: The name of the text box.

BIF.title: Text Control
BIF.description: The control that will be used for the text.

BIG.title: Text Edit Box Grid Collection Name
BIG.description: The name of the collection that the text edit box grid is in.

BII.title: Text TTS
BII.description: The text-to-speech override text for the element.

BJB.title: Nine Slice Size
BJB.description: Specifies the pixel margins used for 9-slice rendering. Can be a single integer applied to all four sides, or an array [left, top, right, bottom].

BJC.title: Texture File System
BJC.description: The file system that the texture is in.

BJE.title: Tiled
BJE.description: If true, the texture will be tiled.

BJF.title: Tiled Scale
BJF.description: The scale factor used when tiling a texture. Specified as [x_scale, y_scale].

BJG.title: Toggle Default State
BJG.description: The default state of the toggle.

BJH.title: Toggle Grid Collection Name
BJH.description: The name of the collection that the toggle grid is in.

BJI.title: Toggle Group Default Selected
BJI.description: The default selected toggle of the toggle group.

BJJ.title: Toggle Group Forced Index
BJJ.description: The forced index of the toggle group.

CAB.title: Toggle Off Button
CAB.description: The button that will toggle the element.

CAC.title: Toggle On Button
CAC.description: The button that will toggle the element.

CAD.title: Touch Mode
CAD.description: The touch mode of the element.

CAE.title: TTS Control Header
CAE.description: The header of the TTS control.

CAF.title: TTS Control Type Order Priority
CAF.description: The priority of the TTS control type order.

CAH.title: TTS Ignore Subsections
CAH.description: If true, the element will ignore subsections.

CAI.title: TTS Index Priority
CAI.description: The priority of the TTS index.

CAJ.title: TTS Inherit Siblings
CAJ.description: If true, the element will inherit its siblings.

CBB.title: TTS Override Control Value
CBB.description: If true, the TTS will override the control value.

CBC.title: TTS Section Header
CBC.description: The header of the TTS section.

CBD.title: TTS Toggle Off
CBD.description: If true, the TTS will toggle off.

CBE.title: TTS Toggle On
CBE.description: If true, the TTS will toggle on.

CBF.title: TTS Value Changed
CBF.description: If true, the TTS value will change.

CBG.title: TTS Value Order Priority
CBG.description: The priority of the TTS value order.

CBJ.title: Unchecked Control
CBJ.description: The control that will be unchecked.

CCA.title: Unchecked Hover Control
CCA.description: The control that will be unchecked when hovered.

CCB.title: Unchecked Locked Control
CCB.description: The control that will be unchecked when locked.

CCC.title: Unchecked Locked Hover Control
CCC.description: The control that will be unchecked when locked and hovered.

CCD.title: Use Anchored Offset
CCD.description: If true, the element will use the anchored offset.

CCE.title: Use Child Anchors
CCE.description: If true, this element will stack its controlled element in respect to their anchor values.

CCG.title: Use Last Focus
CCG.description: If true, the element will use the last focus.

CCH_variables.title: Variable Definition
CCH_variables.description: A variable is a reference to a value that can be used in the UI.

CCH.title: Variables
CCH.description: The variables that are contained within this element.

CCI.title: Virtual Keyboard Buffer Control
CCI.description: The control that will be used for the virtual keyboard buffer.

CCJ.title: Visible
CCJ.description: If true, the element will be visible.

CDA.title: Zip Folder
CDA.description: The folder that the element will be zipped into.

CDB.title: Gesture Tracking Button
CDB.description: The button used for gesture tracking on input panel elements.

CDC.title: Always Handle Controller Direction
CDC.description: If true, the element will always handle controller direction input.

CDD.title: Secondary Color
CDD.description: The secondary color of the element.

CDE.title: Always Accepts Input
CDE.description: If true, the element will always accept input.

CDF.title: Placeholder Text Hover Color
CDF.description: The color of the placeholder text when hovered.

CDG.title: Hover Text Max Width
CDG.description: The maximum width of the hover text. A value greater than zero will result in line breaks being added to limit width.

CDH.title: Full Storage Color
CDH.description: The color used when storage is full.

CDI.title: Scrollbar Always Visible
CDI.description: If true, the scrollbar will always be visible even when content fits.

CDJ.title: TTS Skip Message
CDJ.description: If true, text-to-speech will skip the message for this element.

CEA.title: Follows Cursor
CEA.description: If true, the element will follow the cursor position.

CEB.title: Gamepad Cursor
CEB.description: If true, the element acts as a gamepad cursor.

CEC.title: Next Sub Page Button Name
CEC.description: The name of the button that navigates to the next sub page.

CED.title: Previous Sub Page Button Name
CED.description: The name of the button that navigates to the previous sub page.

CEE.title: Tooltip Name
CEE.description: The name of the tooltip element to show.

CEF.title: Tooltip Top Content Control
CEF.description: The control to use for the top content of the tooltip.

CEG.title: Tooltip Bottom Content Control
CEG.description: The control to use for the bottom content of the tooltip.

CEH.title: Tooltip Area
CEH.description: The area that triggers the tooltip.

CEI.title: Tooltip TTS Value
CEI.description: The text-to-speech value for the tooltip.

CEJ.title: Consume Event
CEJ.description: If true, the event will be consumed and not propagated.

CFA.title: Element Name
CFA.description: The name of a UI element definition key. Can be a simple identifier or use @-style inheritance to extend another element.

anyOf.title: Simple Element Name
anyOf.description: A simple element name without inheritance.

anyOf.title: Inherited Element Name
anyOf.description: An element name with @-style inheritance syntax from a static namespace.

anyOf.title: Variable-inherited Element Name
anyOf.description: An element name that inherits from a variable reference.

anyOf.title: Variable Element Name
anyOf.description: A variable used as an element name, optionally with @-style inheritance.

anyOf.title: Variable-to-Variable Element Name
anyOf.description: A variable element name inheriting from another variable.
